dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4436 IS: Protecting Human Rights and Public Health in Foreign Assistance Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mrs. Shaheen (for herself, Ms. Rosen, Mr. Schumer, Mrs. Murray, Mr. Van Hollen, Mr. Coons, Mr. Kaine, Ms. Baldwin, Mr. Hickenlooper, Ms. Duckworth, Mr. Booker, Mrs. Gillibrand, Mr. Merkley, Mr. Kim, Ms. Alsobrooks, Mr. King, Mr. Bennet, Mr. Schatz, Mr. Blumenthal, Mr. Kelly, Ms. Cortez Masto, Mr. Luján, and Mr. Wyden) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Foreign Relations

form.official-title: To nullify certain rules related to foreign assistance.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Protecting Human Rights and Public Health in Foreign Assistance Act.

section.header: Nullifying certain rules relating to foreign assistance

paragraph.text: The final rules described in subsection (b) and any successor or substantially similar rules shall have no force or effect.
No Federal department or agency may take any action—

subparagraph.text: to implement, administer, or enforce the final rules described in subsection (b); or
to propose, finalize, implement, administer, or enforce any successor or substantially similar rules or policies to the final rules described in subsection (b).

paragraph.text: The final rules described in subsection (b) shall be treated as though they had never taken effect.

subsection.text: The final rules described in this subsection are—

paragraph.text: the final rule submitted by the Department of State relating to Protecting Life in Foreign Assistance (91 Fed. Reg. 3319; January 27, 2026).
the final rule submitted by the Department of State relating to Combating Discriminatory Equity Ideology in Foreign Assistance Rules (91 Fed. Reg. 3345; January 27, 2026).
the final rule submitted by the Department of State relating to Combating Gender Ideology in Foreign Assistance (91 Fed. Reg. 3332; January 27, 2026).
